translation.pleaseListenToAudio: Nceda umamele umsindo kude kube sekupheleni.
translation.yourWorkWillBeSubmitted: Umsebenzi wakho uya kuthunyelwa ngokuzenzekelayo xa ixesha liphelile.
translation.common_loading_error: Kukho into engahambi kakuhle ngexesha lokulayishwa kwedatha: (
translation.wrondLinkParametrError: Ufikelele kule URL ngempazamo. Nceda uqhagamshelane nomququzeleli wale applet ngoncedo olungaphezulu.

autoCompletion.title: Ukulungiswa kweempendulo
autoCompletion.description: Nceda ulinde kwaye ungayivali i-app. Iimpendulo zakho ziyasetyenzwa.
autoCompletion.processCompleted: Iimpendulo zakho ziqwalaselwe. Ungalivala ngoku iphepha.
autoCompletion.restartActivityWarning: Awunakuphinda uqalise uphando kuba ixesha liphelile. Nceda uyiqalise kwakhona kwaye ungenise iimpendulo zakho.

dialog.body: Ukwabelana ngeempendulo esidlangalaleni kuthetha ukuba ulwazi olunikezelwe ngabasebenzisi ngabanye, njengeempendulo zophando okanye ingxelo, luya kufumaneka ngokuvulelekileyo ukuze abanye bajongwe.

timesupModal.title: Ixesha liphelile
timesupModal.description: Alisekho ixesha lokusebenza kulo msebenzi. Wonke umsebenzi owenzileyo uya kugcinwa kwaye ungeniswe.

validation.passwordCharacterTypes: Iphasiwedi mayiqulathe ubuncinci {{types}} be: unobumba abakhulu, abancinci, inombolo, isimboli.
validation.passwordMustInclude: Iphasiwedi kufuneka iqulathe ubuncinane {{minLength}} amagama, kungabikho zithuba, kwaye noko {{types}} kwezi 4 zingezantsi:
validation.passwordMustIncludeMinimum: Iphasiwedi kufuneka iqulathe ubuncinane {{minLength}} amagama kwaye kungabikho zithuba.
validation.mfaCodeFormat: Ikhowudi yokuqinisekisa must be inamanani ama-6.
validation.recoveryCodeFormat: Ikhowudi yokubuyisela must be ibekwifomathi XXXXX-XXXXX.

MFA.enterVerificationCode: Nceda ngenisa ikhowudi yokuqinisekisa eboniswe kwi-app yakho yesiqinisekiso.
MFA.mfaSessionExpired: Iseshoni yakho iphelelwe lixesha. Nceda ungene kwakhona.
MFA.tooManyAttempts: Mininzi kakhulu imizamo engaphumeleliyo. Nceda uzame kwakhona mva.

transferOwnership.notFound: Ikhonkco lotshintshiselwano lobunini alikho okanye alisebenzi ixesha elide.

accepted.title: Ubunini bamkelwe
accepted.message1: I-Applet ngoku ikubunikazi bakho kwaye iyafikeleleka kwiDashboard yakho.

declined.title: Ubunini Buyaliwe
declined.message2: Ukuba oku bekuyimpazamo, nceda ufikelele kumnini we-Applet kwaye umcele ukuba aqalise ugqithiselo kwakhona.

invitation.notAssociatedAccount: Esi simemo asinxulumananga neakhawunti ongene kuyo ngoku. Nceda ungene kwi-akhawunti ehambelana ne-imeyile ofumene isimemo.
invitation.notFound: Ikhonkco lokumema alisebenzi okanye alisasebenzi ixesha elide.

inviteContent.title: Umenyiwe ukuba ube {{role}} ye
inviteContent.description: Emva kokuba usamkele isimemo, uya kukwazi ukufikelela {{displayName}} kwi-app yasimahla yeCurious kwisixhobo sakho esiphathwayo, ukuba ulandela amanyathelo amathathu alula (bona isikhokelo somsebenzisi ngeenkcukacha ezithe vetshe):
inviteContent.step1: Faka i-Curious app kwisixhobo sakho esiphathwayo, ukuba ayikafakwa.
inviteContent.step2: Vula iCurious app kwisixhobo sakho esiphathwayo, kwaye ungene
inviteContent.step2_1: (ukuba une-akhawunti yeCurious) okanye ubhalise (ukuba umtsha kuCurious). Ukubhalisa, cofa "Umsebenzisi Omtsha" kwisikrini sokungena, kwaye ufake idilesi ye-imeyile apho ufumene khona esi simemo se-imeyile.
inviteContent.step3: Cofa {{displayName}} kwi-Curious homescreen kwaye ulungele ukuhamba! Ukuba i{{displayName}}ayiveli, hlaziya isikrini ngokutyibiliza umnwe wakho ezantsi ukusuka phezulu, kwaye ivili elijikelezayo kufuneka livele ngelixa ulayisha {{displayName}}.
inviteContent.footer: I-Child Mind Institute ngumdali weCurious, iqonga lokwenza ii-applet, kodwa alinaxanduva lomxholo we-applet owenziwe ngamaqela angaphandle.
inviteContent.reviewers: Abasebenzisi abangabona idatha yakho yale applet:
inviteContent.managers: Abasebenzisi abanokutshintsha iisetingi zale applet, kuquka nabanokufikelela kwidatha yakho:
inviteContent.coordinators: Abasebenzisi abanokutshintsha iisetingi zale applet, kodwa abangenakho ukutshintsha abangabona idatha yakho:
inviteContent.notFound: Ikhonkco lokumema alisebenzi okanye alisasebenzi ixesha elide.

Login.title: Ngena
Login.errorMessage: Igama lokugqithisa elingalunganga ukuba lo msebenzisi ukhona.
Login.passwordResetSuccessful: Igama lokugqithisa lakho limiselwe ngokutsha ngempumelelo. Nceda ungene ngephasiwedi yakho entsha.

SignUp.title: Yenza i-akhawunti
SignUp.signUpError: Ukubhalisa akuphumelelanga. I-imeyile isenokuba sele isetyenziswa.

ForgotPassword.title: Lungisa Igama Lokugqithisa
ForgotPassword.successMessage: Ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona igama lokugqithisa lithunyelwe ku{{email}}

ChangePassword.title: Yenza Iphasiwedi Entsha
ChangePassword.invalidLink: Eli khonkco alisebenzi okanye liphelelwe lixesha. Nceda ucofe apha ukuseta kwakhona igama-mfihlo lakho.

Landing.title: Wamkelekile kwiCurious
Landing.reserchStudies: Thatha inxaxheba kwizifundo zophando lwezenzululwazi kwi-intanethi!

Profile.title: Khuphela uCurious ukuze uqalise.
Profile.description: Enkosi ngokwenza i-akhawunti noCurious. Khuphela Curious kwi iOS okanye isixhobo Android ukuze uqalise.

SetPassword.passwordShort: Igama lokugqithisa must be libe nonobumba aba-6 ubuncinane
SetPassword.passwordBlank: Igama lokugqithisa akufuneki liqulathe izithuba ezingenanto
SetPassword.passwordSame: Igama lokugqithisa alinakufana negama lokugqitha elidala

Consent.getStarted: Uphantse walapho. Ukuze uqalise, kuya kufuneka

additional.activity_resume_restart: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima yonke inkqubela kwaye uqalise kwakhona
additional.activity_already_completed: Ugqibile! Olu vavanyo sele lugqityiwe kwisixhobo esahlukileyo.
additional.flow_deleted_body: Lo msebenzi wokuhamba ususiwe ngu admin. Usenako ukuqalisa kwakhona kwaye ugqibezele inkqubela yakho ekhoyo.
additional.terms_text: Ndiyaqonda ukuba ulwazi olunikelwe kolu luhlu ayenzelwanga ukuthatha indawo yengcebiso, uxilongo, okanye unyango olunikwa ngugqirha okanye ingcali yempilo yengqondo, kwaye iimpendulo zam ezingachazwanga zisenokusetyenziswa kwaye kwabelwane ngazo kuphando ngokubanzi ngempilo yengqondo yabantwana.
additional.footer_text: KUNYE NOKWENZA UNYANGO LWENGQONDO YOMNTWANA, I-PLLC (KUNYE, “I-CMI”) AYIWENZI NGQO OKANYE NGINGQONDO NGENGQONDO OKANYE IKHIWE INGCEBISO ZEZONYANGO NJENGXALENYE LWEMIBUZO. I-CMI AYIQINISEKI NGAYO NALUPHI UXANDUVA, UNYANGO, ISIGQIBO EESENZELWEYO, OKANYE INYATHELO ELITHATYATHIWEYO NGOKUXHOMEKELA KULWAZI LWEMIBUZO, KWAYE AYIQINISEKI UXANDUVA LOKUSEBENZISA LE MIBUZO.

translation.no_markdown: Ababhali bale applet abanikanga naluphi na ulwazi!

takeNow.invalidRespondent: Awugunyaziswanga ukuba ugqibezele olu vavanyo egameni lesi sifundo.
takeNow.mismatchedRespondent: Kukho ukungangqinelani phakathi komphenduli olindelekileyo kunye nomsebenzisi wewebhu ongenileyo. Nceda ungene njengomphenduli ochanekileyo ukuqhubeka noThatha ngoku.
takeNow.successModalLabel: Iimpendulo zakho zingenisiwe. Nceda ubuyele ku-Admin App ukugqiba omnye umsebenzi okanye ukujonga iziphumo.

translation.targetSubjectBanner: Nceda uqinisekise ukuba zonke iimpendulo zakho zimalunga{{name}}
translation.noActivities: Akukho misebenzi ikhoyo onokuthi uyigqibe ngoku

prolific.nocode: Kwenzeke imposiso xa kufunyanwa ikhowudi yakho yokugqiba kwi-Prolific. Siyaxolisa ngale ngxaki. Nceda usebenzise "NOCODE" kwiProlific njengekhowudi yakho yokugqibezela
prolific.alreadyAnswered: Sele uwuphendulile lo msebenzi. Nceda ubuyele kwi-Prolific kwaye ungenise ikhowudi yakho yokugqiba okanye ulandele umgaqo-nkqubo we-NOCODE.
prolific.invalid: Akunakuqinisekisa uphononongo. Nceda uqhagamshelane nomlawuli wesifundo.

requestHealthRecordData.title: Cela iData yeRekhodi yezeMpilo
requestHealthRecordData.linkText: Funda ngakumbi malunga nendlela Curious efikelela ngokukhuselekileyo kwidatha yenkathalo yezempilo.
requestHealthRecordData.partnershipText:
Unomdla usebenzisa i-1upHealth's Medical Information Service ukwenza ukuba umphandi wakho afikelele kulwazi kwiirekhodi zakho zokhathalelo lwempilo.

Kwezi zikrini zilandelayo, uya kucelwa ukuba ungene kwiinkqubo zakho zabaBoneleli bezeMpilo kwaye wabelane ngedatha yakho yokhathalelo lwempilo nolu phononongo. Uya kubuyela kumsebenzi weCurious xa ugqibile.
requestHealthRecordData.additionalPromptText:
Ugqibile ukungena kwi-akhawunti yakho yokhathalelo lwempilo.

Ngaba ungathanda ukungena kuzo naziphi na ii-akhawunti zokhathalelo lwempilo ezongezelelweyo?

translation.announcementBanner: <0>Uhlaziyo</0><1> loyilo lusendleleni - usetyenziso oluhle olufanayo, inkangeleko entsha. Cofa </1><2>ukufunda ngakumbi.</2>

tokenExpired.title: Uphawu Luphelelwe
tokenExpired.message: Le seshini iphelelwe lixesha. Iqhagamshela kwakhona kwi-1UpHealth...
tokenExpired.banner: Iseshoni yakho iphelelwe lixesha. Izama ukuhlaziya...

geographicRestriction.title: Uthintelo lweJografi
geographicRestriction.message: Lo mxholo awufumaneki kwingingqi yakho. Nceda utsibe uye kwinyathelo elilandelayo.
geographicRestriction.banner: Ukufikelela kwi-1UpHealth okwangoku kuthintelwe kubasebenzisi ngaphakathi eUnited States.

serviceUnavailable.title: Inkonzo ayifumaneki
serviceUnavailable.message: Asikwazi ukuqhagamshela kwi-1UpHealth ngeli xesha. Nceda utsibe eli candelo okanye uzame kwakhona kamva.
serviceUnavailable.banner: Inkonzo ye-1UpHealth ayifumaneki okwangoku. Nceda uzame kwakhona mva.

communicationError.title: Impazamo yoNxibelelwano
communicationError.message: Asikwazi ukuqhagamshela kwi-1UpHealth ngeli xesha. Nceda utsibe eli candelo okanye uzame kwakhona kamva.
communicationError.banner: Impazamo yokunxibelelana ne-1UpHealth. Nceda uzame kwakhona mva.

unknownError.title: Imposiso engaziwayo
unknownError.message: Asikwazi ukuqhagamshela kwi-1UpHealth ngeli xesha. Nceda utsibe eli candelo okanye uzame kwakhona kamva.
unknownError.banner: Kwenzeke impazamo engaziwayo. Nceda uzame kwakhona mva.

ehrRedirectModal.title: Konke kwenzekile
ehrRedirectModal.label: Ugqibile ukungena kule akhawunti yomboneleli wezempilo. Nceda ubuyele kwi-app apho uqale khona le nkqubo.
